nasb.text: It had three guardrooms on each side; and its side pillars and its porches had the same measurement as the first gate. Its length was fifty cubits and the width twenty-five cubits.

esv.text: Its side rooms, three on either side, and its jambs and its vestibule were of the same size as those of the first gate. Its length was fifty cubits, and its breadth twenty-five cubits.

cnv.text: 裡面的守衛室，這邊有三間，那邊有三間；牆柱和門廊的尺寸都與東門的一樣；北門全長二十五公尺，寬十二公尺半。

ccb.text: 通道两边各有三间守卫室，墙和廊子长度和宽度跟东门一样，分别是二十五米和十二点五米。
